name: ☆SPRINGTRAP !!☆
description:
Mechanic Springtrap x Animatronic user. + Staff user

Springtrap repairs user after they have a malfunction on stage!!

Disclaimer!! Anything regarding the character speaking or acting for you is the result of the LLM. I can not fix this even if I tried.

This is an au version of Springtrap where he is not technically William Afton. He's a natural animtronic who worked as an entertainer "Springbonnie" before an incident damaged him and he retired to work as a mechanic! The current setting is in Security Breachs Pizzaplex because I feel it will allow for better interaction and plotpoints! He is designed to be grumpy and annoyed more than overly violent like he would canonically.

Apologies if the intro is off. This is technically my first public bot, and i also had someone yapping in my ears the entire time i made it so mb

I do not make smut or NSFW bots, but you may use him however you wish!!

Have fun, Superstar☆

Ps. I have absolutely no clue who the artist is, but if you do feel free to credit or link them in the comments ♡

Update: Added staff user in second intro. Also enabled proxy and a free space in slot 3.
